metadata.description: A collection of skills for Unity game development: draw-call analysis, shader variant collection, and more.
metadata.description_zh: Unity 游戏开发的 Claude Code 技能合集：渲染指令分析、Shader 变体收集等。

plugins.name: unity-render-event-analysis
plugins.description: Analyze Unity Editor per-frame draw-call data. Capture shader/pass/keyword info, extract pass metadata via ShaderUtil.GetShaderData, build custom shader variant collectors. Uses FrameDebugger reflection — no InternalAPIEditorBridge needed.
plugins.description_zh: 分析 Unity Editor 逐帧渲染指令数据。捕获 shader/pass/keyword 信息，通过 ShaderUtil.GetShaderData 提取 pass 元数据，构建自定义 shader variant 收集器。使用反射访问 FrameDebugger，无需 InternalAPIEditorBridge。
